title: Special Projects Area
body:
Alright it seems like MonoSec hasn’t yet found the Special Projects Area but they have started a serious investigation into the disappearance of our office in District06. I’m still not taking any chances.

So far I don’t believe there is a mole or any saboteurs on the team or the hounds would have been here sooner. It will be safer for everyone if we split and fade into isolation.


Everyone is clever enough not to get caught (I hope). If anyone does get found by Alora or Monogon, we may need to plan to mount a rescue mission.

Riscii
‎
